creator: rainbow@sanitylinux.org
text:
Created attachment 189226
vzvol.shar for version 0.5.5

As per issues discussed in https://github.com/RainbowHackerHorse/vzvol/issues/11
vzvol has been updated to 0.5.5, and I have updated distinfo, the Makefile, and regenerated a .shar accordingly for this port.
